title: Pokécap
description:
A fabric cobblemon modpack for Pokecap, a cobblemon server. Whith performance mods, shaders and more !!!

made by bolcotcot, me, myself and me.
body:
A cobblemon modpack featuring various mods, **especially client side mods** but also **non-client side mods (only two** at the time I am writing this). The client side mods are mainly performance mods and quality of life mods and the server side mods are cobblemon (obviously) and exposure (a survival friendly camera mod)

I made this modpack for a server of the same name. (Pokecap is a server that I made to play with my friends, you can still download the modpack but you will not be able to join the server because it's private and there is a whitelist)

Cobblemon is a mod that adds pokemon into minecraft

_bolcotcot_
